meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenarios.trigger: Team wants to standardize motion across the product.
scenarios.orientation: Start with an audit of existing animations, extract common patterns, define 3-5 values per token scale, build one primitive as proof of concept, then expand.

scenarios.trigger: Developer writes a one-off animation when a primitive exists.
scenarios.orientation: Check if the existing primitive can cover the use case or needs a variant. If a new pattern is genuinely needed, add it to the system — don't allow bypass.

scenarios.trigger: Designer specifies animation that cannot be built as a token.
scenarios.orientation: Translate the designer's intent into the token system: identify the semantic purpose, map to existing duration and easing scales, and prototype together.

scenarios.trigger: Need to measure motion system adoption.
scenarios.orientation: Run lint rules to count raw animation values vs. token references. Track per-component adoption rate. Focus migration effort on the 20% of components driving 80% of animation code.
